content.en:
"Finally recovered!"

Ye Tian breathed a sigh of relief.

It took thousands of years and countless places to calm down my state of mind, eliminate the idea of being bored with cultivation, and return to a normal state of mind.

"My mood is still a little lower, although I have been practicing for countless years this time, and I have been in a lonely state, but it is so easy to have a mentality problem, and I am still a little less emotional!

Ye Tian said darkly.

Now, Ye Tian's state of mind has recovered, and he is ready to retreat and cultivate again, and cultivate the time fragment holy technique he created to the consummation realm, so that he can ensure that his holy technique can exert a powerful effect.

There are a lot of treasures in the battle gate, and in the following days, Ye Tian used his previous treatment one by one, entered a treasure land to assist in the cultivation of enlightenment, and comprehended the fragments of time for cultivating holy techniques.

Coupled with the assistance of some treasure resources of the Battle Gate, Ye Tian's cultivation speed was very fast.

What's more, this holy technique was created by Ye Tian himself, and the speed of improving the realm was naturally faster.

Only tens of thousands of years had passed, and Ye Tian had successfully cultivated this holy technique to the consummation realm.

As for raising it to the extreme realm, the difficulty is relatively high, and it will take a long time, so Ye Tian gave up for the time being.

After all, the battle gate has already been publicized, and he is going to challenge the strongest domain ancestor of the ghost fox organization, if he has been cultivating in the war ancestor realm, outsiders may say that he is cowardly and afraid of things, and he is cowering in the battle gate headquarters, not daring to go out.

Therefore, he must challenge the Ghost Fox Organization's Supreme Domain Ancestor.

------------------

The Dark Sanctuary, the Golden Bone City.

As one of the giant cities, the Golden Bone City is also one of the city-level forces, the city lord is the Supreme Domain Ancestor Golden Bone Domain Ancestor, the strength is not weak, and he also has the strength of the third grade of the Supreme Domain Ancestor, otherwise there is no way to steadily build a city-level force.

If it was an ordinary Supreme Domain Ancestor, where he dared to build a city-level force, he would have been wiped out a long time ago.

The Golden Bone Domain Ancestor also has some background, and it is rumored that he is the son of an elder of a sect, so he has a relationship with the sect, so he can naturally establish a city-level force steadily.

On this day, Ye Tian came to the Golden Bone City.

"Golden Bone City has arrived!"

Ye Tian muttered.

According to the information of the Battle Gate, a four-star master of the Ghost Fox Organization settled in Golden Bone City, so he came here.

Ye Tian didn't bother to go directly to the Golden Bone City to find someone, but swept it with his copying talent, locked the position of the four-star master, the Famous Sword Domain Ancestor, and immediately shouted: "Famous Sword Domain Ancestor, come out!"

"Who?"

The Famous Sword Domain Ancestor was refining a domain weapon knife when he suddenly heard Ye Tian's voice, which was full of power, pointing directly at him, and immediately interrupted his refining weapon.

Suddenly, he was annoyed!

The reason why he settled in Golden Bone City was because this giant city was close to an area of the Dark Sanctuary that was good at ores, so there were a large number of top-grade materials here, and a large amount of materials could be obtained at any time, allowing him to continuously refine the Sword Domain weapon.

He has a secret technique, which can comprehend the path of the sword through refining the knife, and even comprehend the advanced sword domain technique, and can even refine his overlord sword holy body through refining.

He is very serious about refining weapons, and he will never allow anyone to disturb him, otherwise he will be his enemy.

Swish!

The Ancestor of the Famous Sword Domain locked on to Ye Tian outside the Golden Bone City and shuttled over in an instant.

And this scene also attracted the attention of many domain ancestors in Golden Bone City, and even the city lord of Golden Bone City was alarmed.

The Famous Sword Domain Ancestor can be called the strongest person in the Golden Bone City, although he is not a person of the city-level power of the Golden Bone City, but the Golden Bone City Lord has also met the Famous Sword Domain Ancestor, after all, sometimes he also needs to rely on the Famous Sword Domain Ancestor to deter foreign enemies!

"Who would dare to trouble the Famous Sword Domain Ancestor?"

The Golden Bone Domain Ancestor was curious.

He didn't step forward to help, after all, his power was far inferior to the Famous Sword Domain Ancestor, if he couldn't even deal with the Famous Sword Domain Ancestor, wouldn't he go up to find death?

Therefore, watching the game is the best choice.

Outside the Golden Bone City.

The Famous Sword Domain Ancestor stared at Ye Tian and frowned.

He hadn't seen Ye Tian, so he didn't know who Ye Tian was?

However, he could feel that Ye Tian's strength was not simple, and he was afraid that it would be difficult to deal with.

"Who are you?"

The Famous Sword Domain Ancestor asked.

"Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestor Ye Tian!" Ye Tian reported to his family: "You are the strongest domain ancestor of the ghost fox organization, the ghost fox organization attacked me, I will officially challenge the strongest domain ancestor of the ghost fox organization from today, the famous sword domain ancestor, you are my first challenge!"

"What, you are the Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Laws Domain!"

The expression of the ancestor of the Famous Sword Domain changed greatly.

Over the years, although he had been refining weapons, he didn't care much about the affairs of the Ghost Fox Organization, after all, he didn't need to take over tasks during these years, but the Ghost Fox Organization also sent him some information, including the matter of the Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Law Domains.

But all along, he felt that this matter should not be his turn.

But he never expected that Ye Tian would be the first to find him.

If he had known, he would have been hiding in the branch or headquarters!

"Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor, I'm just a four-star master, you should challenge the four-star king!"

The Ancestor of the Famous Sword Domain said in fear.

"You are the strongest domain ancestor, I am also the strongest domain ancestor, but the cultivation realm can be the same as yours, is it possible that if you are weak, I can't challenge you? It's a joke! If the enemy is stronger than yourself, then what else can you challenge? The challenge must challenge the weak!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

The Famous Sword Domain Ancestor had a good and reasonable idea, but he didn't want to compete with Ye Tian!

Abrupt!

The ancestor of the Famous Sword Domain sacrificed tens of thousands of domain weapons, and they were all top-notch domain weapons, and they were knife weapons.

A large number of Sword Domain Weapons appeared in the sky, turning into a sword array, enveloping Ye Tian.

"Boom!"

The Ancestor of the Famous Sword Domain blew up this large number of knives, trying to block or severely damage Ye Tian.

And he didn't continue to attack, but instantly activated a secret treasure and fled.

Fighting with Ye Tian, he is not stupid!

Now, he just wants to escape!

However.

As soon as he activated the treasure, a hand reached out of the void and interrupted his escape.

Then, a spear pierced through his body, and a wave of holy skill power burst out, which was the power of the hegemonic holy technique.

Bang!

The body of the Famous Sword Domain Ancestor was blown up and fell on the spot.

And the self-explosion of that large number of knives did not hurt Ye Tian at all, and it was difficult to stop Ye Tian.

Ye Tian was proficient in the space holy technique, and an empty escape holy technique easily left the area where the knife self-detonated.

I have to say that the difference in strength between the two is too big.

After the fall of the Famous Sword Domain Ancestor, Ye Tian used the Void Escape Saint Technique and left.

Not far away.

Many of the domain ancestors in the Golden Bone City were dumbfounded.

"The Ancestor of the Famous Sword Domain was killed in seconds!!!"

They couldn't believe it, this was the strongest person in the Golden Bone City!
